## Title: Fix resource leaks in shared memory creation function

### Summary
The `create_shm()` function in the gNB tracer application had resource management issues where file descriptors and shared memory segments could leak on error paths. The function opened a file with `open()` but never closed the file descriptor, and on failure conditions (ftok error, shmget failure, shmat failure), it would call `err_exit()` without proper cleanup. This could lead to resource exhaustion in long-running p
